title: quercus × mutabilis
intro: Quercus × mutabilis, also known as the hybrid oak, is a unique plant that is a cross between the Chinese evergreen oak (Quercus acutissima) and the Japanese evergreen oak (Quercus acuta). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds that can help soothe and protect the skin, as well as reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Quercus × mutabilis include its ability to boost the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and act as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergic reactions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, or tinctures, to make its medicinal properties more accessible for therapeutic use.
